finding_results.notes: Kept full legal/financial fact load in Nora's voicemail, compressed Eli's desk recap to pressure-relevant essentials, and preserved the repayment section as forward decisions/actions rather than a second full recitation.
Replaced abstract reassurance with concrete, observable aftermath (sound, air, tactile residue, breath/rib response) while preserving Marisol's boundary line.

Reduced repeated managerial mantra diction (numbers/dates/facts/receipts cluster), varied phrasing across voicemail, recap, planning, and text beats, and retained concrete dates/amounts/account/legal specifics.
Recast all three flagged beats into affirmative constructions with concrete consequence, removing the recurring negation-led correction template while preserving pressure and embodied specificity.

Kept Nora's voicemail accountability lexicon at the required anchors (43, 53) and diversified later repetition with scene-specific phrasing centered on shift tasks, transfer mechanics, and proof language (75, 153, 201).
